name: Multi-Stage C2 Channel Setup
description: Detects patterns of multi-stage C2 where initial dropper downloads additional payloads
query:
// Detect multi-stage channel behavior
// Trigger on certutil, curl, wget, or PowerShell downloading then executing
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(certutil.*urlcache|Invoke-WebRequest|curl.*-[oO]|wget\s+http|bitsadmin.*transfer)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
